snippet.title: HRDQ-U
snippet.description:
HRDQ-U is a learning community for organizational trainers and facilitators, coaches and independent consultants, organization development professionals, managers responsible for training their teams; really anyone who shares our passion for soft-skills training and performance improvement.

We bring exciting content to you through live webinars and on-demand webinars from subject matter experts and thought leaders to help you explore new ideas, gain industry insight, and improve people skills in your workplace. Many webinars provide insights into practical tools and resources for you to use in your own organization.

We also offer virtual seminars for training your employees including a full curriculum of soft-skills training courses offered live and for replay on demand.

Don't forget to subscribe to our channel and if you watch a video that you find helpful, please give us a like.

snippet.title: The Foundation for Critical Thinking
snippet.description:
The Foundation for Critical Thinking, a 501(c)(3) non-profit, is the world's oldest think tank dedicated to critical thinking. We and our sister organization, The Center for Critical Thinking, aim to foster robust, comprehensive, ethical critical thinking throughout human life and human societies. The Paul-Elder Framework for Critical Thinking is used by educators around the world, in businesses, and in intelligence analysis in the US military.

For hundreds of hours of additional footage, the world's largest written library of critical thinking resources, nearly 100 interactive exercises, guided study groups, and more, join us at The Center for Critical Thinking Community Online:
www.criticalthinkingcommunity.org

To learn more about the Foundation and its direct learning opportunities, including professional development for organizations, visit:
www.criticalthinking.org

snippet.title: Wireless Philosophy
snippet.description:
Learn about Philosophy with professors from Yale, Stanford, Oxford, MIT, and more!  130+ animated videos.  An official Khan Academy Partner.

Our mission is to introduce people to the practice of philosophy by making videos that are freely available in a form that is entertaining, interesting and accessible to people with no background in the subject.

snippet.title: Phil McKinney
snippet.description:
Phil McKinney has spent forty years making high-stakes innovation decisions — and watching smart leaders get them wrong.

As CTO of Hewlett-Packard, he led the innovation strategy that earned HP three consecutive Fast Company Most Innovative Company rankings. He co-founded a company and took it public. Now he runs CableLabs, the R&D engine behind the global broadband industry.

Every week on The Innovators Studio, Phil shares what those decisions actually looked like — the real stories behind breakthrough innovations, expensive failures, and the leadership calls that separated them. No theory. No consultants. Just pattern recognition built from four decades inside the room where the decisions happened.

If you're a business leader, entrepreneur, or executive trying to make better innovation and strategy decisions, this is the podcast built for you.

Running since 2005. Tens of millions of downloads. New episodes every Wednesday.

#Innovation #Leadership #BusinessStrategy

snippet.title: Macat
snippet.description:
Critical thinking is about to become one of the most in-demand set of skills in the global jobs market.* Are you ready?

Learn to plan more efficiently, tackle risks or problems more effectively, and make quicker, more informed and more creative decisions with Macat’s suite of resources designed to develop this essential set of skills.

Our experts have already compiled the 180 books you feel you should know—but will never have time to read—and explained them in a way that helps you think smarter. Dip in and learn in 3 minutes or 10 minutes a day, or dive in for 3 hours, wherever you are on whatever device you have. And there’s so much more to come: we’re working with the University of Cambridge and UCL to develop tools that will empower anyone to think more critically. 

Our philosophy is simple: the world’s greatest ideas can prepare us for the AI revolution and save humanity. Skynet is coming — only the smartest thinkers will survive.

* “Future of Jobs Report", WEF,  Jan 16

snippet.title: Focused Felix
snippet.description:
Welcome to Focused Felix — the home of intentional living, deep focus, and systems that help you do less, but better.

If you're tired of distractions, burnout, and aimless grinding, this channel is your blueprint to a more productive, meaningful life.

Every week, you'll find videos on:

Deep work & time-blocking strategies

Productivity apps & digital planning tools

Habits that actually stick

Building systems for a calm, focused lifestyle

Self-improvement from a practical, no-hype lens

Whether you're a student, creator, entrepreneur, or 9-to-5 grinder — Focused Felix will help you take control of your time and energy.

🎯 Stay focused. Think clearly. Live intentionally.
📅 New videos every week.

snippet.title: Aperture
snippet.description:
Your window to the Bigger Picture. This channel is about philosophy, psychology, and society, where we explore the deep questions of existence and where humanity is headed.

Here’s what you’ll find:
- Big ideas about consciousness, meaning, and what it means to be alive
- Discussions about life, death, purpose, and what we value
- Explorations of the impact of artificial intelligence, the singularity, and technological change
- Theories and stories that help you see how the present links to our future

If you’ve ever wondered why we exist, what shapes our reality, or where all of this is going, this is for you. Subscribe to Aperture and be part of thinking about humanity’s next chapters.

A show by Underknown.

snippet.title: TED
snippet.description:
The TED Talks channel features the best talks and performances from the TED Conference, where the world's leading thinkers and doers give the talk of their lives in 18 minutes (or less). Look for talks on Technology, Entertainment and Design -- plus science, business, global issues, the arts and more. You're welcome to link to or embed these videos, forward them to others and share these ideas with people you know.

TED's videos may be used for non-commercial purposes under a Creative Commons License, Attribution–Non Commercial–No Derivatives (or the CC BY – NC – ND 4.0 International) and in accordance with our TED Talks Usage Policy: https://www.ted.com/about/our-organization/our-policies-terms/ted-talks-usage-policy. For more information on using TED for commercial purposes (e.g. employee learning, in a film or online course), please submit a Media Request at https://media-requests.ted.com

snippet.title: TED-Ed
snippet.description:
TED-Ed’s mission is to create lessons worth sharing. Feed and expand your curiosity with our award-winning animated shorts - published on YouTube and available with supplemental learning materials on ed.ted.com.

Want to suggest an idea for a TED-Ed animation, nominate an educator or animator? Visit our website at: http://ed.ted.com/get_involved.

Consider backing us on Patreon. By doing so, you directly support our nonprofit mission to create free, high-quality educational content: https://www.patreon.com/teded

For more information on using TED-Ed content for commercial purposes (e.g. employee learning, in a film, or in an online course), please submit a Media Request using this link: https://media-requests.ted.com/

snippet.title: Odyssey of History
snippet.description:
Odyssey of History is the premier destination for cinematic history documentaries and deep-dives into the most pivotal moments of human civilization. If you are looking for the best history documentaries, our channel delivers high-fidelity storytelling, rigorous research, and expert analysis of world history.

From the rise and fall of ancient empires to the untold secrets of historical figures, we bring the past to life. Our mission is to provide an immersive educational experience, exploring the ancient world, medieval warfare, and the modern era.

What We Explore:

Ancient Civilizations: Deep dives into Ancient Rome, Egypt, the Maya, and Greece.

Historical Mysteries: Investigating archaeological discoveries and unsolved enigmas.

Military History: Detailed breakdowns of legendary battles and tactical warfare.

Biographies: The true stories of conquerors, monarchs, and revolutionaries.

Timeline of History: Understanding the Industrial Revolution, the World Wars, and the Cold War.

From the rise and fall of ancient empires to the untold secrets of historical figures, we bring the past to life. Our mission is to provide an immersive educational experience, exploring the ancient world, medieval warfare, and the modern era.

What We Explore:

Ancient Civilizations: Deep dives into Ancient Rome, Egypt, the Maya, and Greece.

Historical Mysteries: Investigating archaeological discoveries and unsolved enigmas.

Military History: Detailed breakdowns of legendary battles and tactical warfare.

Biographies: The true stories of conquerors, monarchs, and revolutionaries.

Timeline of History: Understanding the Industrial Revolution, the World Wars, and the Cold War.

snippet.title: Nick Sadler
snippet.description:
Welcome to the official channel of Nick Sadler – where creativity, technology, and business collide. I explore the tools and strategies driving the next generation of creators. Whether you're building a record label, launching a film, or scaling your creative business with AI, you're in the right place.

🎵 The Label Machine – Tutorials, interviews, and strategies for building successful music brands.
🎬 First Flights – Behind the scenes of film funding, distribution, and the future of independent cinema.
🤖 AI for Creators – Practical workflows, tools, and prompts to scale creative businesses using AI.Subscribe for weekly content that helps you grow faster, create smarter, and stay ahead of the curve.

snippet.title: Stephen Petro
snippet.description:
I'm on a mission to make critical thinking a movement - are you with me? 

You're probably just a TAD bit hyper-analytical like me, but you also want to achieve self-mastery without selling your soul and sacrificing your ethics... 

On this channel, I distill my years of experience as a peer-reviewed value theorist (with expertise in ethical theory and decision theory and advanced knowledge of behavioral science and neuroscience), as well as 13+ years as an entrepreneur, into weekly videos teaching you how to use critical thinking to perform at the highest levels - ALL while having a massive impact on the larger world. 

If you also believe in this vision - in the power of education and critical thinking to change the world - then I invite you to Think It Through with me!

snippet.title: Indeed
snippet.description:
More people find jobs on Indeed than anywhere else. Indeed is the #1 job site in the world* with 580M job seeker profiles.** Indeed allows job seekers to search millions of jobs, post resumes, research companies and more in over 60 countries and 28 languages. And over 3.5M employers use Indeed to find and hire new employees. For more information, visit https://www.indeed.com. 

On our YouTube channel, we feature career tips, highlight career paths and more. Subscribe for help in your job search. #Indeed #CareerTips 

Get better job matches when you complete your Indeed profile: https://go.indeed.com/4ER6C8
Download the Indeed mobile app: https://go.indeed.com/8EPR6X
Create a free Indeed account: https://go.indeed.com/7NA37Z
Find your next job: https://go.indeed.com/findjobs 
Get more tips: https://go.indeed.com/RFW437

*ComScore, Total Visits, March 2024
**Indeed data (worldwide), job seeker accounts that have a unique, verified email address

snippet.title: LearnFree
snippet.description:
For more than a decade, the Learnfree.org program has helped millions around the world learn the essential skills they need to live and work in the 21st century. From Microsoft Office and email to reading, math, and more, Learnfree.org offers tutorials in more than 190 topics. 
Notice: LearnFree (formerly GCFGlobal, managed by Goodwill International) is now operated by Setser Group Community, a registered U.S. 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, [04 February 2026].

snippet.title: The Rubin Report
snippet.description:
Dave Rubin is a New York Times bestselling author, comedian, and TV personality best known for his political commentary. He is the host of The Rubin Report, a top-ranking talk show recognized as one of the most influential spaces for candid conversations about politics, culture, current events, and more.

The Rubin Report is powered by you, the viewers!
The message that we’re sharing about freedom and an honest exchange of ideas is connecting people all over the world. Now is your chance to be part of that message by contributing to our show which is fan-funded.

Subscribe and click the notification bell to receive alerts for all our videos and visit https://rubinreport.com/support to support The Rubin Report.

For access to EXCLUSIVE content, join The Rubin Report Locals community at:
http://RubinReport.Locals.com

Buy “Don't Burn This Country” the follow up to Dave Rubin’s New York Times bestselling “Don’t Burn This Book” here: https://daverubin.com/book/

snippet.title: Mr. Beat
snippet.description:
For all sponsorship inquiries, please contact mrbeat@algebramedia.com. For other business contacts and endorsements see iammrbeat.com/about.html.

Mr. Beat is an educator, video producer, podcast host, and musician who specializes in making history and geography more engaging. He has written songs about all of the Presidents and has created music videos for all of them. Beat’s specialty is American history, but he also has a big passion for geography and economics. His channel features the series Presidential Elections in American History, Supreme Court Briefs, and Compared. Subscribe for a new video every week. 

Snail mail: Mr. Beat, PO Box 1982, Lawrence, KS 66044

How to support Mr. Beat: 
Donate for great perks on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/iammrbeat
Donate on Paypal: https://www.paypal.me/mrbeat
Buy Mr. Beat a coffee: https://ko-fi.com/iammrbeat
“Free” ways to show support:
Subscribe to my channel
Turn on notifications
Like, share, and comment on my videos

snippet.title: Simply Resilient Me
snippet.description:
Hey, I’m Rachel — a Gen Xer, cancer survivor, and I believe life doesn’t come with a map, but it does come with lessons. On this channel, I share honest, practical, and sometimes sarcastic insights about resilience, midlife advice, life after cancer, mental health, and what it really means to live well.
If you’re over 40 (or just tired of pretending you’ve got it all figured out), you’ll find a mix of dry humor, grounded wisdom, and philosophy you can actually use — from Stoicism to Buddhism to everyday common sense. And if you’re younger, think of this as a shortcut to lessons you don’t have to learn the hard way.
Here we talk about thriving in midlife (not disappearing into it), navigating stress, anger & negativity, finding resilience when plans fall apart, and the wisdom that comes with age and experience.
This isn’t about toxic positivity or quick fixes. It’s about truth, perspective, and finding your way forward — with a little laughter along the way.   Grab a coffee and join me

Not on (and never was on) Twitter, Facebook, or any other social media platform.

snippet.title: TEDx Talks
snippet.description:
TEDx is an international community that organizes TED-style events anywhere and everywhere -- celebrating locally-driven ideas and elevating them to a global stage. TEDx events are produced independently of TED conferences, each event curates speakers on their own, but based on TED's format and rules.

For more information on using TED for commercial purposes (e.g. employee learning, in a film or online course), please submit a Media Request here: https://media-requests.ted.com.

We support the development of reading, vocabulary, grammar, and writing skills, targeting personal, academic, and professional improvement; and college-readiness. Instructors can use our videos as supporting materials.

Become a member and get perks https://youtube.com/snaplanguage/join

es_MX.title: Snap Language
es_MX.description:
Snap Language se especializa en ayudarle a perfeccionar sus habilidades lingüísticas y comunicativas para mejorar su vida en la escuela, en el trabajo, y en situaciones cotidianas. También es útil para maestros de inglés como material de apoyo en sus clases.

[CC] Los videos son en inglés con subtítulos en inglés, español y portugués.

pt_BR.title: Snap Language
pt_BR.description:
Snap Language se especializa em língua e linguística assim como em apoiá-lo no aperfeiçoamento de suas habilidades linguísticas e comunicativas no âmbito escolar e profissional na escola e na vida cotidiana. Nossos materiais também são úteis para professores de inglês como material de apoio em suas aulas. Nossos vídeos são legendados em inglês. Vários também tem legendas disponíveis em português e espanhol.

Verifique os benefícios que pode receber como membro do canal https://youtube.com/snaplanguage/join

snippet.title: Pursuit of Wonder
snippet.description:
Fostering reflection through powerful ideas and stories.

Wonder is the feeling of curiosity and appreciation inspired by something beautiful, inexplicable, or unfamiliar. At Pursuit of Wonder, we create work with the aim of producing that feeling. 

Through video essays, short stories, guided experiences, books, and more, we explore a wide range of topics related to philosophy, psychology, science, literature, well-being, and more. We believe in facing the challenges and complexities of life head-on, and in doing so, we strive to inspire a reconnection with child-like wonder and a comfort with the uncertainty and absurdity of existence.
